Event: Lagoon Adventure
Event Date: 19/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E86
Cool Breeze

Enhancement: 1
During the entire battle, when attacking, the fighter stuns the target with a 60% chance for 1 seconds and deals physical damage equal to 190% / 200% / 210% / 220% / 230% / 240% / 250% of their attack.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Throughout the battle, when attacking, the fighter has a 65% chance to turn the target into stone for 2 seconds. During this time, the target cannot move and receives 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% more damage. Additionally, the owner of the engraving deals pure damage to the target in the amount of 240% / 250% / 260% / 270% / 280% / 200% / 300% of their attack.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
During the entire battle, when attacking, the fighter has a 70% chance to turn the target into a stone block for 3 seconds. During this time, the target cannot move and takes 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% more damage. Also, during this time, the target takes 70600 / 100800 / 144000 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 / 400000 magical damage every second. After the effect ends. the target explodes. Upon explosion, the target receives 88200 / 126000 / 180000 / 240000 / 300000 / 375000 / 487000 pure damage and its physical and magical armor are reduced by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, 2 closest enemy fighters are hit by stones. The stones deal 82300 / 117600 / 168000 / 224000 / 280000 / 350000 / 450000 physical damage upon impact and stun for 2 seconds. Furthermore, when the ability is triggered. the fighter deals pure damage equal to 290% / 300% / 310% / 320% / 330% / 340% / 350% of their attack to the target and all enemy fighters within a small radius around it.
